issues.description: AttachDon action missing condition to target only rested DON!! cards. Card text specifies 'give up to 3 rested DON!! cards' — requires a condition filter for rested DON cards, not all DON cards.
Rest action should target up to 1 opponent character with cost ≤6, but lacks explicit 'maxCount':1 constraint in target specification. Current DSL implies singular but should be explicit.
